item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When the United States men’s national team takes the pitch for its first World Cup match, its players’ feet will land on newly installed grass at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, typically the home of the NFL’s Los Angeles Rams and Los Angeles Chargers.

media:content.media:description: Workers install the pitch at New York New Jersey Stadium (temporarily renamed from MetLife Stadium) ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup on May 7, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A rainbow is seen on the pitch at halftime as the grounds crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025.
media:content.media:description: The crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 semifinal match at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, N.J.

item.title: World Cup grass fields have NFL players asking why they still play on turf

item.description: El delantero de 31 años entró de cambio y fue clave para que su país consiguiera el empate en su debut. Lo más importante fue que el país de la ‘Hoja de Maple’ conquistó su primer punto en la historia en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

media:content.media:title: Cyle Larin habla sobre su gol histórico para que Canadá empatara con Bosnia y Herzegovina
media:content.media:description: El delantero de 31 años entró de cambio y fue clave para que su país consiguiera el empate en su debut. Lo más importante fue que el país de la ‘Hoja de Maple’ conquistó su primer punto en la historia en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

item.title: Cyle Larin habla sobre su gol histórico para que Canadá empatara con Bosnia y Herzegovina

item.description: Las emociones estuvieron a flor de piel en el empate entre Canadá y Bosnia y Herzegovina. Revive las reacciones de aficionados y cuerpo técnico durante un partido que mantuvo la tensión hasta el último minuto.

media:content.media:title: Pasión pura: las reacciones más intensas de Canadá y Bosnia y Herzegovina
media:content.media:description: Las emociones estuvieron a flor de piel en el empate entre Canadá y Bosnia y Herzegovina. Revive las reacciones de aficionados y cuerpo técnico durante un partido que mantuvo la tensión hasta el último minuto.

item.title: Pasión pura: las reacciones más intensas de Canadá y Bosnia y Herzegovina

item.description: Una gran definición del futbolista del Southampton para poner la paridad 1-1 en el primer partido de Canadá en la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Cyle Larin anota el 1-1 para la "Hoja de Maple"
media:content.media:description: Una gran definición del futbolista del Southampton para poner la paridad 1-1 en el primer partido de Canadá en la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Cyle Larin anota el 1-1 para la "Hoja de Maple"

item.description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

media:content.media:title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México
media:content.media:description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

item.title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México

item.description: Disfruta de Futbol Conection, la recopilación diaria de los mejores videos sobre la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los videos trends, las historias más importantes y las personalidades del momento. Presentado por Xfinity.

media:content.media:title: Esto es lo más viral en las redes sociales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
media:content.media:description: Disfruta de Futbol Conection, la recopilación diaria de los mejores videos sobre la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los videos trends, las historias más importantes y las personalidades del momento. Presentado por Xfinity.

item.title: Esto es lo más viral en las redes sociales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026

item.description: El jugador apareció en el área para enviar el balón al fondo de la red durante un córner. Gran gol del conjunto europeo.

media:content.media:title: Jovo Lukić sorprende a Canadá y pone el 1-0 para Bosnia & Herzegovina
media:content.media:description: El jugador apareció en el área para enviar el balón al fondo de la red durante un córner. Gran gol del conjunto europeo.

item.title: Jovo Lukić sorprende a Canadá y pone el 1-0 para Bosnia & Herzegovina

item.description: Desde Canadá, el desfile de banderas le da la bienvenida al mundo en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Michael Bublé interpreta Bring It On Home to Me en uno de los momentos más destacados de la ceremonia inaugural.

media:content.media:title: Michael Bublé se suma al festejo global y pone voz al desfile de banderas
media:content.media:description: Desde Canadá, el desfile de banderas le da la bienvenida al mundo en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Michael Bublé interpreta Bring It On Home to Me en uno de los momentos más destacados de la ceremonia inaugural.

item.title: Michael Bublé se suma al festejo global y pone voz al desfile de banderas

item.description: La Selección de Canadá arriba al Estadio de Toronto para iniciar su camino mundialista frente a Bosnia-Herzegovina, buscando dar alegría al público canadiense; Los europeos quieren demostrar de qué están hechos.

media:content.media:title: Canadá está listo para el Mundial | Canadá vs Bosnia | Telemundo Deportes
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Canadá arriba al Estadio de Toronto para iniciar su camino mundialista frente a Bosnia-Herzegovina, buscando dar alegría al público canadiense; Los europeos quieren demostrar de qué están hechos.

item.title: Canadá está listo para el Mundial | Canadá vs Bosnia | Telemundo Deportes

item.description: La artista paraguaya que pinta botines revela cómo una obra inspirada en Lionel Messi cambió su vida. Lo que pensó sería el final de su carrera artística terminó convirtiéndose en la oportunidad que le abrió las puertas del fútbol internacional.

media:content.media:title: Lili Cantero: “Si iba a cerrar mi carrera, que sea pintando para Messi” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: La artista paraguaya que pinta botines revela cómo una obra inspirada en Lionel Messi cambió su vida. Lo que pensó sería el final de su carrera artística terminó convirtiéndose en la oportunidad que le abrió las puertas del fútbol internacional.

item.title: Lili Cantero: “Si iba a cerrar mi carrera, que sea pintando para Messi” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: William Prince, Alessia Cara, Jessie Reyez, Elyanna y más pusieron ritmo a una ceremonia que abrió las puertas al Mundial 2026 en suelo canadiense, en una celebración marcada por la identidad y el espíritu del país.

media:content.media:title: ¡Revívelo aquí! Canadá le da la bienvenida al mundo con una celebración de música, color y cultura
media:content.media:description: William Prince, Alessia Cara, Jessie Reyez, Elyanna y más pusieron ritmo a una ceremonia que abrió las puertas al Mundial 2026 en suelo canadiense, en una celebración marcada por la identidad y el espíritu del país.

item.title: ¡Revívelo aquí! Canadá le da la bienvenida al mundo con una celebración de música, color y cultura

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
Ryan J. Reilly
Daniel Arkin
item.description: The Justice Department has signed off on Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, a person familiar with the matter told NBC News.

media:content.media:text: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.
media:content.media:description: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.

item.title: DOJ approves Paramount Skydance’s acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, sources say

item.description: Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire after his company SpaceX began trading publicly. SpaceX is the first of what is expected to be many major IPOs related to AI.

media:content.media:title: Elon Musk becomes first trillionaire after SpaceX IPO
media:content.media:description: Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire after his company SpaceX began trading publicly. SpaceX is the first of what is expected to be many major IPOs related to AI.

item.title: Elon Musk becomes first trillionaire after SpaceX IPO

item.dc:creator: Joelle Gross
Javier Zarracina
Jiachuan Wu
Ashley Mowreader
Joe Murphy
item.description: Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX went public Friday. Here’s how to visualize that level of wealth in charts and graphics.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: A three-dimensional rendering of the Statue of Liberty, $1.77 trillion in stacked hundred dollar bills, a SpaceX rocket and other comparable items.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

item.title: 1,000,000,000,000 (that’s 1 trillion), in graphics

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.description: Officials in Midland, Texas, say that a suspected shooter is dead after a standoff with police. At least one person was killed and several others were injured in the incident.

media:content.media:title: Suspect is dead after standoff in Texas shooting
media:content.media:description: Officials in Midland, Texas, say that a suspected shooter is dead after a standoff with police. At least one person was killed and several others were injured in the incident.

item.title: Suspect is dead after standoff in Texas shooting

item.description: More than a dozen tornadoes left a path of destruction across the Midwest with damage reported in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin. This comes as the East Coast is facing sweltering temperatures. NBC News' Maggie Vespa has the latest.

media:content.media:title: Multiple tornadoes leave a path of destruction across the Midwest
media:content.media:description: More than a dozen tornadoes left a path of destruction across the Midwest with damage reported in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin. This comes as the East Coast is facing sweltering temperatures. NBC News' Maggie Vespa has the latest.

item.title: Multiple tornadoes leave a path of destruction across the Midwest

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
Anagilmara Vílchez
Ronny Rojas
item.description: Bryan José Rojas Galofre wanted to give his wife a lovely honeymoon to see the beach for the first time and perhaps a glimpse of President Donald Trump, whom she supports

media:content.media:text: Bryan Rojas junto con su esposa Socorro Zaragosa, y sus dos hijos.
media:content.media:description: Bryan Rojas alongside his wife, Socorro Zaragosa, and children.

media:content.media:text: The couple now has two children. The youngest one is 2 months old.
media:content.media:description: Bryan Rojas alongside his wife, Socorro Zaragosa, and children.

item.title: He took his wife, a Trump fan, to the president’s hotel in Doral. Instead he was detained by ICE.

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, we look ahead to what’s at stake for President Donald Trump in a handful of upcoming Republican primary runoffs.

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during a proclamation signing in the Oval Office of the White House on June 11.

item.title: Runoffs provide Trump’s next big GOP tests: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
Ryan J. Reilly
Daniel Arkin
item.description: The Justice Department has signed off on Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, a person familiar with the matter told NBC News.

media:content.media:text: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.
media:content.media:description: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.

item.title: DOJ approves Paramount Skydance’s acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, sources say

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: After more than two decades without leads or answers, human remains found in Washington state’s Olympic National Park in 2000 have been identified as Joseph Louis Serrao Jr

media:content.media:description: Aerial view of the river leading to Olympic National Park, Wash.

item.title: DNA technology solves 25-year-old mystery of human remains found in Olympic National Park

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
item.description: The former president’s son told Gov. Gavin Newsom in a podcast that the 2024 pardon from his father shows “how much you know my dad loves me.”

media:content.media:text: President Joe Biden walks with his son Hunter Biden at the White House on July 26, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Then-President Joe Biden pardoned his son Hunter Biden in December 2024.

item.title: Hunter Biden says his father ‘chose me over his legacy’ with controversial pardon

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When the United States men’s national team takes the pitch for its first World Cup match, its players’ feet will land on newly installed grass at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, typically the home of the NFL’s Los Angeles Rams and Los Angeles Chargers.

media:content.media:description: Workers install the pitch at New York New Jersey Stadium (temporarily renamed from MetLife Stadium) ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup on May 7, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A rainbow is seen on the pitch at halftime as the grounds crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025.
media:content.media:description: The crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 semifinal match at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, N.J.

item.title: World Cup grass fields have NFL players asking why they still play on turf

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Firefighters on Friday continue to manage a massive blaze that started Thursday and destroyed a 1 million-square-foot medical supply warehouse in Tracy, California

media:content.media:text: Fire at medical supply warehouse in Tracy, CA on June 11, 2026
media:content.media:description: The fire at a medical supply warehouse in Tracy, Calif., on Thursday.

item.title: Fire destroys medical supply warehouse in Tracy, California
